guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 21. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_oi: Point to the big OI and say: oioioi. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_oy: Now point to the big OY and say: oyoyoy.

parent_story: A boy found a gold coin. The toy train rolled on the shiny oil.
